title: Fix UVM function non-constant default arguments

features.name: uvm_object class method with non-constant default argument
features.description: Code should include a UVM class extending uvm_object with a function that has a non-constant default argument of class reference type

features.name: virtual function with class type default argument
features.description: Code should include a virtual function call where the function has a default argument of class reference type, called without explicit argument

features.name: event trigger with uvm_event default argument
features.description: Code should include a uvm_event trigger call where the trigger function has a non-constant default argument of uvm_object type
